key_algorithms.name: PR Status Determination
key_algorithms.description: Aggregates GitHub check runs into single status (failure > pending > success)

key_algorithms.name: Polling Loop
key_algorithms.description: Connects to GitHub API on configurable interval with dual-mode switching

key_algorithms.name: Status Change Detection
key_algorithms.description: Detects PR status transitions and triggers notifications

configuration.investigate_feature: Optional AI diagnostics on build failures (Copilot Chat integration)

dependencies.authentication: VS Code built-in GitHub auth (no PAT needed)
